title: Stage 01 Requirements Gate
description: Stage 1 (Requirements) gate. Authored by the pm agent after writing pipeline/brief.md. See .devteam/rules/pipeline.md §Stage 1 for the full contract.

acceptance_criteria_count.description: Number of acceptance criteria in the brief. Stage 6 maps these 1:1 to passing tests; mismatch blocks the Stage 7 auto-fold.

out_of_scope_items.description: Things the brief explicitly excludes; reviewers and PM use this to push back on scope creep.

required_sections_complete.description: True when the brief contains every section the brief template requires for the chosen track. See templates/brief-template.md for the canonical blank form.

active_roles.description: Explicit list of build workstream roles that are in scope for this project. null (or absent) means all roles are active. Set by the PM agent when the brief's Out of Scope section excludes a workstream area. The orchestrator filters both build (stage-04) and peer-review (stage-05) dispatch against this list. When absent, the orchestrator falls back to keyword inference from out_of_scope_items.
